slides.heading: Beyond the Textbooks
slides.content: The world is moving towards a **new economic regime**. We should not remain confound in the boundaries of the text books. We should ~~go beyond them~~ also so that we may realise the importance of the economy and may connect to the real life implementation of what we study.

slides.heading: A Workshop on Economics
slides.content: This workshop is an attempt to excellence by our esteemed institution under the efficient guidance of the management and is organised by **Mrs Gopa Mukherjee**, **Mrs Ananya Sarkar** and **Mrs Payal Bhattacharya Pati**, the teachers of the ~~Economics department~~ of our School for the holistic development of the students by introducing them and to enable them to think logically about the subject and its importance.

slides.heading: ~~Pearls Of God School~~
slides.content: Overall development of students under the efficient guidance of well qualified teachers. The institution stands as a beacon of academic excellence.

slides.heading: ~~Mr. Amal Chatterjee~~
slides.content: Established in 1994, the institution is the *brainchild of Mr. Amal Chatterjee*, serving students with dedicated educational leadership.

slides.heading: ~~Mr. Arnab Chatterjee~~
slides.content: Pioneering modern learning methods and academic strategies to drive **overall student development**.

slides.heading: ~~Mrs. Anuradha Chatterjee~~
slides.content: Guiding the institution towards new horizons, fostering **academic growth** and community empowerment.

slides.heading: ~~Mrs. Arpita Dutta~~
slides.content: Managing institutional administration, operations, and academic logistics with `exemplary efficiency and care`.

slides.heading: Workshop on ~~Economics~~
slides.subheading: Building Bricks: The Genesis of a Giant
slides.content: On the ~~32nd Foundation Year~~ of our school, we look forward to welcoming you to this seminar and interactive workshop.
